/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/ImageCompare_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/app/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/models/FolderModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/models/CompareSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/models/ImageListModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/widgets/FolderPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/widgets/BrowsePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/widgets/ComparePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/widgets/ThumbnailWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/widgets/ArrowOverlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/utils/FileUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/utils/ImageUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/services/SettingsManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/services/ImageLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/services/ImageComparer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageCompare.dir/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o ImageCompare -F/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib libImageCompareLib.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/Versions/A/QtConcurrent /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt/6.9.2/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
